item.title: High-Speed Data Capture and AI Analytics Drive Peak\xe2\x80\x99s New Automation Ecosystem
item.description: New AI-powered platform for modernizing logistics and automated warehouse systems.

item.title: Basler CoaXPress-over-Fiber TDI Vision System
item.description: Basler AG announced a CoaXPress-over-Fiber TDI vision system with a bandwidth of up to dual 100 Gbps.

item.title: Onto Innovation and Rigaku Partner to Advance Semiconductor X-ray Process Control
item.description: Partnership advancing next-generation process control solutions for semiconductor manufacturing.

item.title: 3D Vision Meets the Digital Thread in Next-Gen Aircraft Assembly
item.description: Demonstration clearly illustrates the potential that lies in combining the digital process chain, robotics and 3D image processing.

item.title: AI-Powered Hyperspectral Textile Inspection Solution Identifies Fabrics, Detects Flaws
item.description: Automated inspection system designed to classify materials and detect fabric defects.

item.title: Inline 3D Metrology Transforms Shipbuilding by Enabling Real-Time Forming Accuracy
item.description: Fraunhofer IOF developed a high-speed inline 3D measurement system to digitally capture the workpiece enabling precise target/actual comparisons.

item.title: Rise of Physical AI - KUKA and NVIDIA Partner to Launch Automation 2.0
item.description: Automation 1.0 remains as the backbone, while Automation 2.0 adds new flexibility to factory automation according to KUKA robotics.
